info.title: RoRamu.Decoupler.DotNet.Generator.App
info.description:
Rohit Ramu
-a, --assembly          Required. The path to the assembly which contains the
interface(s) to use as the decoupling contract.
-c, --component         Required. The Decoupler component to generate (e.g.
transmitter or receiver).
-o, --outDir            (Default: .generated) Where the class should be
generated.
-n, --namespace         (Default: RoRamu.Decoupler.DotNet.Generated) The
namespace of the generated class.
-m, --accessModifier    (Default: Public) The access level of the generated
class.
--help                  Display this help screen.
--version               Display version information.
